response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering leadership and craftsmanship skills across 15+ years, with evidence of mentoring and architectural thinking. However, there are critical gaps in minimum qualifications: minimal C++ experience (2-3 years documented vs. 8-year requirement) and no demonstrated experience with cloud compute platform architecture. While distributed systems and infrastructure experience exist, they lack the depth and focus on cloud compute technologies needed for this mid-senior role.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across diverse domains with multiple staff-level positions and proven mentorship through technical workshops and engineering practices
Strong foundation in software craftsmanship including TDD, CI/CD, architectural design, and establishing engineering standards across teams
Experience with large-scale infrastructure including microservices handling millions of requests, Kubernetes deployments, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
concerns: Critically limited C++ experience (2-3 years documented vs. 8-year requirement); primary expertise is JavaScript/TypeScript and D Lang
No demonstrated experience building or leading cloud compute platform infrastructure; background is general distributed systems and web/mobile rather than compute-specific
Missing advanced degree (Master's/PhD preferred) and no explicit technical leadership mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
